qa_matrix.question_text: Kindly confirm your full Name
Your Date of birth
Education Qualification
Your current Occupation
qa_matrix.captured_response: I do a job, ma'am. Deputy Manager at State Bank of India.

qa_matrix.question_text: Please show your ID proof
Kindly share your current location( City and state with country)?
qa_matrix.captured_response: I am in Guwahati, ma'am. Guwahati, Guwahati, Assam.

qa_matrix.question_text: You Konduru Praneeth , declare that, you have fully understood the questions asked to you as per this call and have furnished complete, true and accurate information after fully understanding the same. Sir/Mam' are you in agreement with the declaration that I have read out to you.
In the last 24 months, have you smoked or used any tobacco or nicotine products?
Do you consume alcohol ?
Have you ever been advised by a doctor to reduce or stop alcohol consumption ?
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, it's not like that, ma'am, I don't have the habit.

qa_matrix.question_text: Have you ever used recreational drugs or Narcotics that was not prescribed by a Licensed physician ?
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, no, ma'am, nothing like that.

qa_matrix.question_text: What is Proposed insured height (cm)?
What is Proposed Insured weight (kg)?
qa_matrix.captured_response: Weight is between 90-91, ma'am. 90-91 kg. Write 91, ma'am.

qa_matrix.question_text: High/Low blood pressure, raised cholesterol or triglycerides or lipids

Chest pain or heaviness or discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, Heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, shortness of breath or any other heart conditions
Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sacroma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths
Diabetes, raised blood sugar or sugar in urine,Hyperthyroidism, Hypothyroidism , other thyroid disorders, or any other endocrine disorders
Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease (COPD) or any other respiratory disorders
Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or any other diseases or disorders of the liver
Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus or any other diseases or disorders of the blood or autoimmune disease

Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limb, stroke, transient ischemic attack (TIA), multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, Dementia, Alzheimer's or any other neurological, nervous, mental health disorders?

Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcera-tive colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders

Kidney stones, gall stones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hydrocele or any other disorders of the kidney, bladder, genital, prostate or urinary systems?
Recurrent Back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophies, deformity, physical disability or any other disorders of muscle, bones, joints, limbs or spine?
qa_matrix.captured_response: Yes, spondyloarthritis, ankylosing spondylitis is the problem I have.

qa_matrix.question_text: Please provide date of onset, investigations done and results.
qa_matrix.captured_response: MRI, I had it in 2022, ma'am. ... Yes, it's for the spondylitis issue, so I got an MRI done. ... The diagnosis happened around August 2022. ... No, everything is fine, ma'am.
qa_matrix.expected_response: C/O ANKYLOSING SPONDYLITIS, diagnosed in 2022, MRI done

qa_matrix.question_text: Please provide full details of condition including symptoms, treatment and complications if any.
qa_matrix.captured_response: No treatment, ma'am. I do physical exercises daily. ... I don't take any medicines now. ... Ma'am, I took medicine for almost six months, ma'am, six months. ... Saaz, it's called Saaz, S-A-A-Z. ... Pan D. ... No, no complications, I'm perfect now.
qa_matrix.expected_response: TAB SAAZ HS, TAB PAN- D for 6 months, now no complaints, no complications

qa_matrix.question_text: Please provide current status and date of last consultation for this condition.
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, no complications, I'm perfect now. ... It was around February 2023.
qa_matrix.expected_response: now no complaints, last consultation in Feb 2023

qa_matrix.question_text: Blindness,cataracts, glaucoma, impaired sight, double vision or any other diseases or disorders of eyes
Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficult in swal-lowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat

Is there anything else that you would like to share with us with respect to your health/ habits or anything else that you believe is important to ensure that policy is processed basis all facts & information?
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, no, nothing else, ma'am. Only that ankylosing spondylitis, besides that no other illness, nothing, everything is fine.

qa_matrix.question_text: Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years a)Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or prescribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endoscopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: Customer had an MRI in 2022 for spondylitis. The MER should reflect "Yes" and refer to the details.

qa_matrix.question_text: Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years b) Medication or treatment that lasted more than 2 weeks or had been referred to a specialist doctor or hospital for any treatment/consultation and/or investigations (eg: Blood, ECG, MRI, Xray etc)
qa_matrix.suggested_correction: Customer took Saaz and Pan D for 6 months for spondylitis. The MER should reflect "Yes" and refer to the details.

qa_matrix.question_text: Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years c) Inability to perform your daily activities or absent from work more than two 2 consecutive weeks at a time
Have you suffered from any congenital defect or disorder or hereditary disease such as cerebral palsy, Down's syndrome, poliomyelitis
Have you or your spouse or partner been told to undergo tests or treatment, or received any medical advice or counselling in connection with sexually transmitted diseases, including HIV and AIDS?

Apart from what you have disclosed, are you experiencing any unexplained weight loss/gain or any sign/symptoms that you are likely to seek medical advice or treatment for or awaiting any surgical procedure.
Please confirm medical disclosure in Proposal form/Previous Policy with TALIC?

critical_issues: The MER incorrectly records "No" for the question regarding abnormal medical findings or prescribed medical tests (OtherMedical.a) despite the customer disclosing an MRI in 2022 for spondylitis. The doctor's question was broad, and the customer's blanket "No" was factually incorrect based on prior disclosures.

The MER incorrectly records "No" for the question regarding medication or treatment lasting more than 2 weeks (OtherMedical.b) despite the customer disclosing 6 months of medication (Saaz, Pan D) for spondylitis. The doctor's question was broad, and the customer's blanket "No" was factually incorrect based on prior disclosures.
recommendations: The doctor should ensure that all previously disclosed medical information, including tests and treatments, is accurately reflected in subsequent general health questions. If a customer provides a 'No' answer that contradicts earlier statements, the doctor should clarify or re-verify the information.
The MER should be updated to accurately reflect the customer's medical history regarding the MRI and 6 months of medication for Ankylosing Spondylitis under the relevant 'Other Medical' sections.

customer_satisfaction_indicators: Customer is cooperative and provides answers to all questions.
Customer expresses gratitude at the end of the call: "Thank you very much, ma'am."

validation_errors: Customer's 'No' response to the clubbed question covering 'OtherMedical.a' (tests) contradicts the earlier disclosure of an MRI in 2022.
Customer's 'No' response to the clubbed question covering 'OtherMedical.b' (medication > 2 weeks) contradicts the earlier disclosure of 6 months of medication (Saaz, Pan D).

greetings.explanation: The doctor greeted the customer with 'Hello, good evening.'

call_opening.explanation: The doctor introduced herself, confirmed the client's name, and stated the insurer's name.

language_preference.explanation: The doctor asked the customer for their preferred language.

id_validation.explanation: The doctor asked for ID proof and the last four digits of the Aadhaar number.

disclaimer.explanation: The doctor informed the customer about call recording, purpose, duration, and policy implications.

politeness.explanation: The doctor used polite phrases like 'Pardon me for asking these questions, but it's important.'

empathy.explanation: The customer disclosed a serious health concern (ankylosing spondylitis), but the doctor did not express empathy.

communication_skills.explanation: The doctor generally communicated clearly and asked for spelling, but repeated a question about liver problems.

probing.explanation: The doctor asked extensive follow-up questions regarding the customer's ankylosing spondylitis, MRI, treatment, and current condition.

observations.explanation: There was no customer hesitation, third-party prompting, or other unusual events observed.

call_closure.explanation: The doctor asked for a declaration of truthfulness and thanked the customer.
